user_story: Browse Hyperliquid public market data: snapshot the BTC mid price and L2 orderbook depth, then check ETH funding rate trend over the last 24 hours.

turns.prompt: Show me the current BTC mid price on Hyperliquid and the top of the L2 orderbook for BTC.
Now fetch the funding rate history for ETH over the last 24 hours so I can see the trend.
